step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("infertility causes with healthy uterus and ovaries")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Do you agree or disagree with the original conclusion?
Provide exactly two sentences summarizing your agreement/disagreement with the prior conclusion, adding one new piece of evidence.
State your answer choice clearly using \boxed{{letter}}
I agree with the original conclusion that endometriosis is the most likely cause of infertility in this case, especially considering the patient has a healthy uterus and ovaries. New supporting evidence shows that up to 40–50% of women with endometriosis experience infertility, primarily due to inflammation-driven impairment of ovarian and tubal function—even in early-stage cases—and that it accounts for 15% of identifiable female infertility causes according to WHO data, making it a top-tier diagnosis despite absent structural anomalies.
